class Button(Rect):
    def on_click(self, position):
        global state
        state = 1-state
        if state == 0:
            b1.position = (8,10)
            b2.position = (7,8)
        else:
            b2.position = (8,12)
            b1.position = (7,8)


l1 = Line(start=(7,8), end=(7,8))
b1 = Button(position=(7,8))
b2 = Button(position=(8,10))
state = 0
